analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of e2b.dev/docs covered 270 pages with 100% crawl coverage across 271 discovered pages. The site contains 43 confirmed broken internal links, all within user-facing documentation (zero repository navigation links). API reference coverage stands at 67.06% across 86 detected API pages. Only 27.78% of pages display last-updated metadata, and SEO/geo issues affect 14.44% of content. Overall audit confidence is 89.72%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100%) with 270 pages successfully indexed
High overall audit confidence at 89.72% with strong crawl confidence at 95%
API pages successfully detected (86 pages) with no detection failures
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
risks: 43 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation degrade navigation and user trust
API reference coverage gap of 32.94% leaves significant portions undocumented or unlinked
Freshness metadata missing on 72.22% of pages prevents users from assessing content currency
SEO/geo issue rate of 14.44% may impact discoverability and search rankings
2 unverified links due to auth/rate-limit/server blocks create uncertainty in link health
195 trap URLs skipped during crawl suggest potential pagination or infinite scroll issues
API confidence at 85% indicates moderate uncertainty in coverage calculations

prioritized_actions.action: Repair all 43 broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Close API reference coverage gap by documenting or linking remaining 32.94% of API surface
Implement last-updated timestamps on all pages (currently missing on 72.22%)
Resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 14.44% of pages to improve search visibility
Investigate and resolve 2 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limit/server restrictions

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy or correctness of technical content, code examples, or API specifications
2 links remain unverified due to authentication, rate limiting, or server blocks; actual status unknown
Freshness assessment limited to visible metadata; actual content currency requires manual review
Example code reliability estimate does not guarantee runtime correctness or compatibility with current API versions
Crawl trapped 195 URLs suggesting dynamic content patterns that may hide additional documentation pages
